class_name: Modified, Conjugated, Cyclic or Metal-Complex Peptide
description: Peptide containing lipidation, PEGylation, acetylation, amidation, non-natural residues, D-retro-inverso design, cyclisation, metal complexation or another identity-defining modification.
mandatory_evidence: Exact modification, linker or conjugating-group chemical structure
Modification or attachment site and site-occupancy result
Free/unmodified peptide and over-modified species profile
Conjugate, lipid, PEG or metal stoichiometry and distribution
Cyclisation or bridge identity where applicable
Orthogonal characterisation of modified and unmodified species
Potency or receptor-binding comparability where scientifically justified
minimum_methods: LC-MS intact mass and peptide mapping
automatic_rejection: Modification described only by trade name
Copper, PEG, lipid or bridge chemistry omitted
